user.title: Add Pi Kiosk
user.description: Enter the MQTT topic prefix configured on your Pi Kiosk.

confirm.title: Discovered Pi Kiosk
confirm.description: A Pi Kiosk was discovered on your network: **{hostname}** (topic prefix: `{topic_prefix}`). Choose a name and confirm to add it.

abort.already_configured: This kiosk topic prefix is already configured.
